title: Sensing (GSM v1)
description: Links actuation execution to feedback reception, enabling homeostatic loops on actuations.

sensor.description: Reference to Sensor mechanism composed by this sensing.

feedbackReceptor.description: Reference to the Controller's Receptor that receives the SensingFeedbackEvent, closing the homeostatic loop. Mandatory: Sensing only exists for closed-loop actuations (return-value-assignment in Rule body).

sensor.derivedFrom: Rule body → sys.* return-value-assignment → Sensing derivation

actuationEventArchetype.description: EventArchetype of the ActuationEvent (Actuator → Sensor flow, cybernetic step 4).

feedbackEventArchetype.description: EventArchetype of the SensingFeedbackEvent (Sensor → Controller flow, cybernetic step 6).

feedbackReceptor.description: Controller's Receptor that receives the SensingFeedbackEvent, closing the loop.
feedbackReceptor.derivedFrom: Rule body → return-value-assignment → Controller feedbackReceptor derivation
